productDisplayName: Disney Kids Girl's White Round Neck Kidswear
description: Composition:100% cotton round neck white top with blue piping along the collar and sleevesWashcare:Machine wash in cold water with a gentle cycle using mild detergent. Wash dark colours seperately. Do not bleach. Do not soak nor wring. Dry it inside out. Do not tumble dry. Do not iron on print and studs.Fitting:Comfort FitSummer is all about listening to fantasies and dreaming away lying under the warm twilight sky with grandma's tales. So get your little girl into this white tee with blue piping along the neck and sleeves from disney, where Minnie flying away to dreamland reflects the dreamy smile on your little one's face.
